description: A control room operator receives a high-temperature alarm from a heat exchanger in the crude distillation unit and must quickly diagnose the cause.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the high-priority alarm and bring up the process graphic for the crude unit.

expected_outcome.value: The alarm is acknowledged, and the relevant process diagram is displayed.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the trend data for the heat exchanger, looking at temperatures and flow rates on both the hot and cold sides.

expected_outcome.value: Analysis shows the flow rate on the cold side has dropped significantly, causing the temperature rise.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a field operator to check the control valve on the cold-side inlet for potential issues.

expected_outcome.value: A field operator is dispatched to investigate the suspected valve problem.
